notes:
Installs and runs without additional steps. Optionally you can add the DXVK's HUD for feedback purposes, on launcher options.
As expected, it uses the DXVK wrapper to translate DirectX 11 to Vulkan.
On a i7 Haswell CPU with a Nvidia GTX 970 card, with Vulkan drivers, it runs at a solid 60 fps within a 1080p screen.
title: TT Isle of Man

notes: Changing Anti-Aliasing mode to FXAA to remove rendering issues. Unfortunately the game wont let me change the resolution to 1920x1080 on my 4K monitor. I tried to edit the UserSettings.cfg file to 1920x1080, but this caused the game to flicker. Currently the game is barely playable at 25 FPS due to being unable to change the resolution.
title: TT Isle of Man
